description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a before_script to download the Composer installer signature, fetch the installer, verify its SHA‑384 hash, run the installer, remove temporary files, and execute `php composer.phar install`. Cache the `vendor/` directory. Define a single stage `test` and a job `php-7.3-with-coverage` that runs on the `php:7.3-cli-alpine` Docker image, installs build dependencies with `apk add --update --no-cache pcre-dev ${PHPIZE_DEPS}`, installs Xdebug 2.7.2 via `pecl install xdebug-2.7.2` and enables it with `docker-php-ext-enable xdebug`, then runs `vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never`. The job runs in the test stage with no additional triggers.
